name: Lumika Demo Toyota Dealer Agent
description: AAP-compliant Auto Agent Protocol dealer agent for Demo Auto Group in the Bay Area. Exposes inventory search, vehicle detail, dealer profile, and a unified consented lead-submission skill to buyer agents (LLMs and CRMs) over A2A.

extensions.description: Auto Agent Protocol A2A Automotive Retail Profile v0.2

skills.name: Dealer Information
skills.description: Return Demo Auto Group's dealership profile: group name, welcome message, and one or more rooftops with address, geo, contacts, business hours, timezone, and service capabilities.
examples: What time does the San Francisco rooftop open on Saturday?
Show me Demo Auto Group's locations, addresses, and phone numbers.

skills.name: Inventory Facets
skills.description: Return aggregated facets (makes, models, years, conditions, body styles, price/mileage ranges, statuses) over the dealer's inventory. Useful for narrowing down a search before calling inventory.search.
examples: How many used vehicles do you have by make?
What price and mileage ranges cover your certified pre-owned SUVs?

skills.name: Inventory Search
skills.description: Search the dealer's vehicle inventory by make, model, trim, year, condition, price, mileage, body style, fuel, drivetrain, VIN, stock number, or free-text query. Supports pagination and sort.
examples: Find used Honda CR-Vs under $35,000 from 2023 or newer.
Show certified pre-owned RAV4 Hybrids with under 30,000 miles.

skills.name: Vehicle Detail
skills.description: Return full detail for a specific vehicle by VIN, stock number, or vehicle_id, including FTC-compliant pricing fields (msrp, list_price, offered_price, price), photos, features, fuel economy, status, and dealer page URL.
examples: What's included on stock #DT-2451 with delivery to ZIP 94107?

skills.name: Submit Lead
skills.description: Submit a consented lead carrying customer info plus any combination of vehicle of interest, trade-in, and appointment request — a single unified contract that matches how dealerships actually take leads.
examples: Send a buy lead for VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001 with a 2020 Passat trade-in and a Sunday test drive.
Submit a financing question on behalf of the user (no vehicle).
Book a test drive for VIN 1HGCY2F57RA000001 next Saturday morning.

http_security_scheme.description: Bearer JWT issued by Lumika AI for authorized buyer agents. Tokens MUST be sent in the 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header on every request.
